description_long: This object is a long-barreled shotgun with a traditional wooden stock and a metallic barrel. The stock is dark brown with a smooth, slightly curved design, and the butt features a black recoil pad. The barrel is slender, metallic, and extends significantly from the receiver, with a matte finish and no visible ribbing or venting. The receiver area is compact, with a visible trigger guard and a simple, functional design. There is a scope or sight mounted on top of the receiver, suggesting it is intended for precision shooting. The overall appearance is utilitarian, with a blend of wood and metal materials and minimal decorative elements.
description: A long, slender shotgun with a dark wooden stock, metallic barrel, and a mounted scope, featuring a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, metallic barrel, and mounted scope.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the scope above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock's curvature, the trigger guard, and the full length of the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and scope.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and slender with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
